# Morning Star Neuropathy & Pain Treatment Center
# https://morningstarregmed.com
# Generated from ENTITY-VARIABLES.md — do not hand-edit

## About

Morning Star Neuropathy & Pain Treatment Center provides advanced non-surgical neuropathy treatment, regenerative therapy, and chronic pain management for adults in St. Peters, MO and the greater St. Louis area.

Morning Star Neuropathy & Pain Treatment Center is located in St. Peters, Missouri, serving patients throughout St. Charles County and the St. Louis metropolitan area. The clinic specializes in non-surgical neuropathy treatment, regenerative therapies including PRP and exosome therapy, hyaluronic acid injections, neuromodulation, and medically supervised weight loss using semaglutide and tirzepatide.

## Location & Service Area

St. Peters, Missouri. Service radius: 25 miles. Serving St. Peters, O'Fallon, St. Charles, Wentzville, Lake St. Louis, Cottleville, Dardenne Prairie, and the greater St. Louis metro area.

Address: 4710 Mexico Rd Suite C, St. Peters, MO 63376
Phone: (636) 244-0124
Hours: Monday–Thursday 8:00 AM–5:00 PM. Closed Friday–Sunday.

## Services

- Neuropathy Treatment: Customized treatment plans to restore peripheral nerve health and relieve neuropathic pain.
  URL: https://morningstarregmed.com/pain-management/neuropathy-treatment/

- Chronic Pain Management: Personalized pain management combining regenerative, neuromodulation, and lifestyle therapies.
  URL: https://morningstarregmed.com/pain-management/chronic-pain-management/

- Neuromodulation Technique: Controlled electrical stimulation to restore nerve function and reduce chronic pain signals.
  URL: https://morningstarregmed.com/pain-management/neuromodulation-technique/

- Regenerative Therapy: Exosome-based treatments that reduce inflammation and support cellular tissue repair.
  URL: https://morningstarregmed.com/regenerative-medicine/regenerative-therapy/

- Platelet Rich Plasma Therapy: PRP injections using your own platelets to accelerate joint and soft tissue healing.
  URL: https://morningstarregmed.com/regenerative-medicine/platelet-rich-plasma-therapy/

- Hyaluronic Acid Injections: Minimally invasive joint lubrication injections for improved mobility and pain relief.
  URL: https://morningstarregmed.com/regenerative-medicine/hyaluronic-acid-injections/

- Medical Weight Loss: Medically supervised weight loss using semaglutide and tirzepatide for lasting results.
  URL: https://morningstarregmed.com/medical-weight-loss/

## Schedule

Book online: https://morningstarregmed.com/schedule-appointment/
